_comment: Knobs for the lunch rotation. Edit between runs; changes take effect on the next build (npm run build / push). Item ids come from src/data/lunch-pool.json.
_startDate: The very first lunch week (a Sunday). Don't change casually — it anchors the rotation. Weeks run Sun–Sat.
_itemsPerWeek: How many lunches per week (one per day = 7). Lower it for fewer days; the page shows that many, starting Sunday.
_autoGrocery: Default state of the green 'Lunch' grocery section on the home page. true = auto-added/shown by default. (Each browser can still toggle it.)
_exclude: Item ids to NEVER serve (snooze / dislike). Example: ["jerky-trailmix", "deviled-eggs"].
_boost: Item ids to serve more often (mom's favorites). They come back ~3 weeks sooner. Example: ["banana-pb", "greekyogurt-berries"].
_pin: Force specific lunches on a specific week. Keyed by that week's Sunday. Example: { "2026-07-05": ["eggs-celery-carrots", "cucumber-hummus"] }.
_rotation: Variety guardrails per week: max items sharing a protein; max items needing 'some' prep; max grain-based (crackers/bread/etc.); minimum soft-texture items to aim for.
